text: Dad, Hannah drew you a picture of Duke. Mailing it up.
Tell her Duke approves. He's asleep on the porch.
Ha. We'll be up the 14th.
Heading down Saturday with the kids. Need anything?
Bag of coffee. Roads are clear.
Will do. See you then.
Got four days off. Coming up this weekend.
Good. Bring gloves, fence needs walking.
Bringing elk steaks too.
Tell Robert the feed bill's handled.
Will do. Kids miss Duke.
Duke misses them. Bring them down.
Coffee in town Friday? I'm buying.
If you're buying I'm there. Ten o'clock.
See you at the Irma.
Charles, got a history question on the consolidation fight for my class. Got a minute sometime?
Anytime. Call the house after six.
Will do. Thanks.
